title: Level
description: Level: Defines a horizontal plane, or infinite flat two-dimensional surface, based on a height measured along the global Z axis and origin.

Name.description: The Level Reference, ID or text based identifier.

Elevation.description: The position of the Level along the global Z coordinate axis. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
